strengths: Polyglot full-stack craftsman with web, mobile, desktop, and embedded experience demonstrating the broad technical fluency a Principal Engineer needs to identify cross-domain opportunities
Hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq align directly with the role's AI-strategy focus
Founder of GISCollective and creator of multiple open-source platforms, libraries, and conference talks demonstrate entrepreneurial drive and the ability to inspire others through shared insights
concerns: Resume lists Senior/Staff titles rather than Principal or Director-level IC roles
Cumulative experience is closer to mid-career than the 15-year mark specified
Cloud-platform strategy work and large-scale customer advisory experience are not explicitly highlighted

key_factors.factor: Hands-on AI agent and MCP tooling experience
Founder mindset and public knowledge sharing

response.justification: Bogdan brings a rare combination of deep software craftsmanship across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems with current, hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators — exactly the cutting-edge AI builder fluency this role calls for. His founding of GISCollective, sustained open-source leadership, conference talks, and workshops demonstrate the entrepreneurial drive and ability to inspire others that the job description emphasizes. Combined with high-throughput backend work at Dunnhumby, fintech delivery at RIDE, and cloud-native delivery at Optilyz using AWS CDK, he offers a strong, defensible foundation of builder, code, and design fluency to partner with engineering and product teams on AI-driven differentiation.
